name: skincare-guide
description: Caroline Hirons' 'Skincare: The ultimate no-nonsense guide' — the straight-talking guide to understanding your skin, building a routine that works, and cutting through the marketing BS.
useCase: Build a skincare routine that actually works, understand ingredients, solve skin problems, and avoid expensive marketing traps.
knownRisks: Product recommendations may date as new products launch and old ones reformulate
One expert's opinion — other dermatologists may recommend different approaches
Contains strong opinions about specific brands and ingredients
